ab: Lizu, sibunul cak madac ispapatac, maqtuan asu pasimul zaku?
ch: W:Lizu，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Lizu, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: Uka amin nak ica naipi Sani’un.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Sani’s.

ab: Maqtuan pasimulin zaku? Na mahiav sala cak macuqas pesu.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: U, siza i su.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: Miqomicang, qangzin amin cak tupa ki Sani tu miqomicang.
en: Thank you and thank Sani for me.

ab: Maq nak ka maqtu qadandaz su?
en: May I help you?

ab: Na macuqas cak tusa paitacan diki.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: Un, hezang nopa duma hung asaun su simul?
ch: A:好的，是否還有其它書籍你想要借的嗎?
en: Okay, are there any other books you want to borrow?

ab: Na simul’an cak tau paitacan.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: Maqtu’in, ma maca miqan na nitu minpunul munit macoqes hung qai.
ch: A:好了，記得後天書要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: Ni’an asu macoqes zaku ki isqaqesqes.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: Coqesun’in zak takna qa.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: Na mavia tu munhav nak qa isqaqesqes i.
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: Doqe pasimulun su ki Lukus o.
en: Did you lend it to Lukus?

ab: Ni amin cak qanciap, singavan’an zaku.
ch: M:我不知道。我先去問問她。
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: Ngucan cak pasimul su ki inak tu icqaqesqes.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Sani, ica qa hulus qabang ngi Lukus sinpacimul su’u?
en: Sani, did Lukus lend you this coat?

ab: Ni i, ica naipi tina nak sinbaliv penak.
ch: W:不是啊，這是我媽媽買給我的
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: Maqa cia Lukus tu huluc qabang nga maczang isu.
en: ’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: Maqa cia ka huluc qabang nga mataqdung, ni nam maczang nga paitacan.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Sani, heza asu muckun Lukus simuli cui?
en: Sani, did you borrow money from Lukus?

ab: Heza, al coqesun zaku haip pa, minpunul cak madac cui.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: Na lakuq’ asu macoqes si?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: Na coqesun zaku laqbing peca.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: U, na qangzak asu taqo ki Lukus.
en: Okay, I will tell Lukus for you.
